description: Integrate DECIPHER into terminology and translation support
known_blockers: DECIPHER may include sensitive case-level or consent-governed content.
API or data-use terms must be reviewed before any automated extraction.

DECIPHER public site, login/join surfaces, data-file links, terms of use, and consent/privacy boundaries must be reviewed before committing patient, variant, phenotype, syndrome, gene-review, API, or downloaded data rows.
expected_blockers: Only aggregate or public gene/variant/disease evidence may be commit-safe.
Privacy review may block payload use entirely.
blocker_owner: track implementer until reassigned in Phase 0
fallback_path: Keep DECIPHER as metadata-only governance with current EMBL-EBI endpoint references until terms, consent/privacy scope, data-file access, API access, and redistribution rules are explicitly cleared.

evidence_score_policy.promotion_rule: no ontology or LLM signal promotes a translation without human review

last_run.source_version: DECIPHER v11.39 observed on current public landing page; no data files, patient records, or API payloads downloaded
last_run.validation_command: pixi run build-ontology-network; pixi run validate-conductor; pixi run validate-ontology-network; pixi run validate-ontology-network-artifacts; pixi run test-conductor-validation; git diff --check
open_blockers: DECIPHER terms of use review required
consent and privacy scope review required before any patient, phenotype, or variant payload use
data-file and API access policy review required
release/version pinning required before downstream crosswalk or review artifacts

restricted_payload_policy.commit_policy: commit metadata, schemas, bounded non-restricted samples, validation summaries, review-pack structure, and derived reports only after source terms are verified; raw, credentialed, private, full-release, and licensed payloads stay local-only
required_evidence: local-only manifest if any restricted source is touched
redaction or exclusion proof before commit

fail_fast_probe.scope: one authoritative source record, one normalized registry row, one provenance row, one candidate comparison or crosswalk edge when applicable
success_criteria: source authority and license state recorded
payload handling path classified as commit-safe or local-only
schema validation passes for the bounded sample
review pack marks LLM-derived content as candidate-only when present
